title: RapidMeta Hematology | Mitapivat (PK Activator) in Non-Transfusion-Dependent Thalassemia v1.0

pico.pop: Adults with non-transfusion-dependent alpha- or beta-thalassemia (Hb <=10 g/dL, <=5 RBC units in 24 weeks pre-randomization)
pico.int: Mitapivat 100 mg orally twice daily (oral pyruvate kinase activator)
pico.comp: Placebo on top of standard care
pico.out: Hemoglobin response (>=1.0 g/dL increase in mean Hb at week 12-24 vs baseline; primary)
pico.subgroup: Thalassemia genotype (alpha vs beta), splenectomy status, baseline Hb, ferritin

real_data_entries.name: ENERGIZE
real_data_entries.group: Non-transfusion-dependent alpha/beta-thalassemia, mitapivat 100 mg PO BID vs placebo (Hb response wk 12-24 primary)

allOutcomes.title: Hemoglobin response (>=1.0 g/dL increase wk 12-24, RR vs placebo; primary)
Change in FACIT-Fatigue at week 24 (MD vs placebo; key secondary)

real_data_entries.snippet: Source: Glenthoj AP et al. (ENERGIZE) NEJM 2024;391:1493-1503.
